description: Nine wikilinks converted to backticks in son-goku.md per bbl-wikilink-vs-backtick-discipline. All converted links were pure architectural-pattern citations (schema-precedent / memory-rule references), not real thematic edges. Converted: [[trunks]] x3 (line 71 'precedent applies directly'; line 155 'Following the precedent'; line 173 'following the pattern'), [[tamiyo]] x2 (line 155 schema-precedent citation; line 180 'structural precedent on the Magic-side'), [[charizard-line]] x2 (line 173 and line 183), [[mareep-line]] x2 (line 173 and line 183), [[staraptor-line]] x2 (line 173 and line 183), [[bbl-triviabot-no-role-identity-conflation]] x1 (line 157 memory-rule cite), [[bbl-anti-confab-prompt]] x2 (lines 159 and 165 memory-rule cites), [[bbl-multi-copy-bundles]] x1 (line 175 memory-rule cite). Preserved: all appears_on card wikilinks (lines 114-139), [[vegeta]] (rival/fusion-component thematic edge), [[son-goten]] (Gotenks dual-anchor thematic edge), [[trunks]] in lines 169/179/187 (GT traveling-trio co-protagonist real thematic edge — DISTINCT from the schema-precedent uses), [[baby-dbgt]] (GT Baby Saga adversarial thematic edge), [[son-gohan]] (canonical father-son thematic edge), [[pan]] (canonical granddaughter thematic edge), [[bardock]] (canonical father thematic edge).
